hero.title: Build something great
hero.subtitle: A modern website built with Nibbly CMS.

items.title: Fast
items.description: No database means instant page loads.

items.title: Secure
items.description: No SQL injection possible. Minimal attack surface.

items.title: Easy Editing
items.description: Edit content directly on the page when logged in.

entries.question: How do I install Nibbly?
entries.answer: Upload the files to your server and visit /admin/setup.php in your browser.

entries.question: Do I need a database?
entries.answer: No. Nibbly stores all content as JSON files. No database setup required.

entries.question: Can I use my own design?
entries.answer: Yes. Edit the CSS custom properties in style.css to match your brand colors and fonts.
